excludeFiles.description: Files that should be completely unavailable to guests when shared (e.g. secrets)
excludeFiles.title: Exclude Files

gitignore.description: How.gitignore files should be treated with respect to excluding/hiding files from guests.
gitignore.title: Git Ignore

hideFiles.description: Files that should be hidden from guest's file trees, but still accessible (e.g. when following the host)
hideFiles.title: Hide Files
